description: Original workflow-native pet lines that can feel familiar to modern engineering and product teams without copying company brands, logos, mascots, product UI, slogans, or exact palettes.
selectionPrinciple: Make the work rhythm obvious while keeping every public pet name, silhouette, palette, and animation original.
brandSafetyRules: Use workflow categories in public copy, not company-target mappings.
Do not use company names, product names, logos, wordmarks, slogans, screenshots, mascot silhouettes, exact icon geometry, or exact brand palettes unless explicitly licensed.
Avoid one-to-one mascot adjacency in the same tool category.
Reject generated rows that drift toward a protected mark or trade dress.
Keep recognizable cues inside body mechanics and state-specific motion.

lines.audienceWorkflow: preview deploys, edge runtimes, design-engineering loops
lines.whyItLands: People who ship previews all day recognize the edge boundary and instant-settle behavior without needing any platform logo.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No triangle marks, deployment platform names, black-white logo lockups, exact monochrome brand framing, or product UI.
lines.visualLock: A small aerodynamic finch with folded wing edges, neutral charcoal body, pale belly, and one muted green-blue readiness accent.

motionSignature.locomotion: Glides along an invisible edge line with tiny foot taps only when settling.
motionSignature.jumping: Preview pop: wings fold tight, body rises in a short arc, then lands exactly on the same edge.
motionSignature.running: Wing feathers open in near/far cadence like requests resolving across regions.
motionSignature.waiting: One wing holds a tiny attached preview flap open toward the user.
motionSignature.failed: Wing edge folds inward and the bird perches below the line.
motionSignature.review: Leans over the edge with beak aligned to a single preview point.

lines.audienceWorkflow: issue triage, sprint planning, backlog grooming
lines.whyItLands: The character reads as fast, precise prioritization for teams that live in issue queues.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No issue-tool logos, exact app colors, UI cards, ticket icons, or product names.
lines.visualLock: A lean lynx with alert ears, clean angular markings, and a tail tip that behaves like a priority marker.

motionSignature.locomotion: Silent prowl with shoulder-led steps and tail marking the next path.
motionSignature.jumping: Short decision pounce with a pause before the landing.
motionSignature.running: Eyes sweep side to side while the tail tip sorts a tiny attached priority trail.
motionSignature.waiting: Sits low with one paw held above the next invisible issue.
motionSignature.failed: Ears flatten and the tail marker bends out of sequence.
motionSignature.review: Nose pins one point while the body stays ready to move.

lines.audienceWorkflow: design systems, prototypes, visual QA, design handoff
lines.whyItLands: Designers and design engineers recognize bezier-like control without a copied app mark.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No multicolor logo stack, product UI, brand dots, exact tool palette, or component-library marks.
lines.visualLock: A compact finch with wing tips shaped like soft vector handles and a tiny alignment notch on the beak.

motionSignature.locomotion: Precise breakpoint hops with wings snapping to clean angles.
motionSignature.jumping: Handle stretch: wing tips pull outward, lift the bird, then snap back into alignment.
motionSignature.running: Beak nudges alignment while wing handles measure spacing.
motionSignature.waiting: Balances on one foot with both wing tips held as editable handles.
motionSignature.failed: Wing handles kink asymmetrically and feathers fluff like broken spacing.
motionSignature.review: Beak traces an invisible baseline, then both handles lock.

lines.audienceWorkflow: docs, specs, internal knowledge bases, block editing
lines.whyItLands: The block motion feels native to docs tools while the animal and panels are original.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No cube marks, wordmarks, black-white app icon language, screenshots, or exact editor UI.
lines.visualLock: A sturdy badger with blocky fur panels that remain part of the body.

motionSignature.locomotion: Grounded shuffle where body panels settle one after another.
motionSignature.jumping: Panel lift: fur blocks compress, lift, and reseat in a cleaner stack.
motionSignature.running: Paws reorder attached fur panels like moving content blocks.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds one body panel half-raised, asking where it belongs.
motionSignature.failed: Panels slide out of order and the badger crouches over them.
motionSignature.review: Sniffs the top panel and taps twice to approve order.

lines.audienceWorkflow: repos, branches, pull requests, code review
lines.whyItLands: Repo users get the branch trail immediately without any code-host mascot adjacency.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No cat/octopus hybrid, tanuki, bucket icons, host logos, PR UI, or exact code-host palettes.
lines.visualLock: A curious beagle with a tail that forks into two soft branch-like stripes inside the silhouette.

motionSignature.locomotion: Nose-led trot that follows a forked scent trail implied by tail movement.
motionSignature.jumping: Merge hop: front paws lift, tail fork closes, then body lands aligned.
motionSignature.running: Sniffs left and right before choosing the clean branch path.
motionSignature.waiting: Sits with nose pointed at a fork, waiting for reviewer direction.
motionSignature.failed: Tail fork knots and ears droop over the nose.
motionSignature.review: One paw pins the chosen branch while eyes check the other.

lines.audienceWorkflow: serverless functions, edge workers, lightweight background jobs
lines.whyItLands: The tiny distributed flicker reads as function execution without clouds or lambda marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No cloud logos, lambda glyphs, orange-cloud palettes, product names, or detached sparks.
lines.visualLock: A small floating wisp with three body-contained glow pockets and a simple face.

motionSignature.locomotion: Teleports by squash-stretch flicker while all glow pockets stay attached.
motionSignature.jumping: Cold-start pulse: dims, brightens, rises, and settles into steady glow.
motionSignature.running: Glow pockets activate in different corners of the body like distributed tasks.
motionSignature.waiting: Hovers dim with one glow pocket ready but unlit.
motionSignature.failed: Glow pockets desync and the outline sags.
motionSignature.review: Compresses into a focused flame shape and checks one pocket.

lines.audienceWorkflow: CI steps, automation, job orchestration
lines.whyItLands: Frills can become a readable job-step meter that stays organic and original.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No check-run logos, circular CI marks, pipeline UI, green check icons, or platform names.
lines.visualLock: A calm axolotl whose frills are shaped like step tabs, with a restrained coral and slate palette.

motionSignature.locomotion: Soft amphibian crawl with frills ticking before each step.
motionSignature.jumping: Frill fan-hop: frills open in sequence, body lifts gently, then tabs close.
motionSignature.running: Frills light in order as paws advance through a job loop.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds the next frill tab half-open for input.
motionSignature.failed: One frill tab folds backward and the body lowers.
motionSignature.review: Lines up all frills symmetrically, then nods.

lines.audienceWorkflow: checkout, payments, commerce, reconciliation
lines.whyItLands: Commerce teams recognize the flow from selection to settled state without card or store marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No card-network marks, shopping bags, payment logos, stripe patterns, or checkout UI.
lines.visualLock: A smooth gecko with belly scales that can align like a completed flow.

motionSignature.locomotion: Wall-crawl glide with belly scales rolling in order.
motionSignature.jumping: Confirm pop: belly scales compress, body lifts, then scales lock cleanly.
motionSignature.running: Scales pass a tiny attached token from snout to tail in one smooth loop.
motionSignature.waiting: Pauses with a scale half-turned, waiting for authorization.
motionSignature.failed: Scale order breaks and the gecko sticks flat to the ground.
motionSignature.review: Turns sideways to expose balanced scales.

lines.audienceWorkflow: observability, traces, spans, performance reviews
lines.whyItLands: Tracing has a natural movement metaphor and does not require vendor marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No dog mascots, honeycomb grids, vendor color systems, dashboards, or chart screenshots.
lines.visualLock: A manta ray with subtle fin lines that can ripple as attached spans.

motionSignature.locomotion: Smooth glide with fin ripples flowing downstream.
motionSignature.jumping: No jump; a gentle bank upward, then a clean return to depth.
motionSignature.running: Fin lines ripple in nested span order from center to tip.
motionSignature.waiting: Hovers flat with the next ripple held halfway.
motionSignature.failed: One fin folds unevenly and the body dips.
motionSignature.review: Banks to expose one highlighted fin edge.

lines.audienceWorkflow: AI model work, prompt iteration, eval culture
lines.whyItLands: AI-tool users recognize eval passes and model attention without using lab marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No AI-lab logos, blossoms, spirals, dots, model names, chat UI, or branded palettes.
lines.visualLock: A quiet moth with layered wings, small antennae, and body-contained evaluation bands.

motionSignature.locomotion: Soft wing flutter with antennae leading direction changes.
motionSignature.jumping: Attention lift: wings close, body rises, then opens into a controlled hover.
motionSignature.running: Wing bands pass through three evaluation phases and return to neutral.
motionSignature.waiting: Antennae pause forward while wing bands stay unlit.
motionSignature.failed: Wings fold too tight and bands go uneven.
motionSignature.review: Antennae form a small focus angle while one wing band steadies.

lines.audienceWorkflow: team chat, threads, async collaboration, workflow automation
lines.whyItLands: Threaded communication maps well to a curling tail and subtle body-band shifts.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No hash-logo shapes, exact four-color mark palettes, chat UI, screenshots, or workspace names.
lines.visualLock: A small chameleon with muted body bands and a tail that coils into thread-like loops.

motionSignature.locomotion: Slow sticky walk while the tail uncoils just enough to lead.
motionSignature.jumping: Tiny branch-hop with tail coiling first and body following.
motionSignature.running: Body bands shift in muted channel cadence as the tail tightens a thread.
motionSignature.waiting: One eye watches the user while the tail holds an unfinished loop.
motionSignature.failed: Bands desaturate and the tail knot doubles back.
motionSignature.review: Both eyes converge on the same tail loop.

lines.audienceWorkflow: product strategy, prioritization, launch planning
lines.whyItLands: PMs recognize the prioritization behavior without any roadmap-tool UI.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No PM-tool marks, product-board screenshots, exact kanban cards, or product names.
lines.visualLock: A raven with wing feathers shaped like reorderable priority tabs.

motionSignature.locomotion: Deliberate hops with feathers lagging like deferred priorities.
motionSignature.jumping: Priority hop: feathers fan, reorder, then close into a clean sequence.
motionSignature.running: Wing feathers sort from scattered to ranked while the beak scans.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds one feather-tab outward for a tradeoff decision.
motionSignature.failed: Feathers cross and the raven lowers its head.
motionSignature.review: Locks wing tabs and gives one decisive nod.

lines.audienceWorkflow: financial correctness, reconciliation, billing systems
lines.whyItLands: The pet reads as balanced money movement without using payment logos.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No bank marks, card logos, payment brands, currency symbols, or financial UI.
lines.visualLock: A flat ray with symmetrical belly plates that align into balance.

motionSignature.locomotion: Even gliding beats with left and right plates balancing after each fin stroke.
motionSignature.jumping: Balance lift where both fins rise equally and settle in sync.
motionSignature.running: Belly plates alternate debit-credit-like motion without symbols.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds one side slightly raised, waiting for reconciliation.
motionSignature.failed: One plate sticks out and the ray tilts.
motionSignature.review: Rolls enough to show all plates aligned.

lines.audienceWorkflow: data warehouses, analytics platforms, data modeling
lines.whyItLands: Data teams get the heavy storage and sorting metaphor without snowflake or lakehouse marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No snowflake icons, spark marks, vendor palettes, database logos, or dashboard screenshots.
lines.visualLock: A compact walrus with shelf-like tusks and stacked whisker rows.

motionSignature.locomotion: Heavy scoot with tusks keeping rows level.
motionSignature.jumping: Barely leaves baseline; tusks lift first, body follows, then shelves resettle.
motionSignature.running: Whisker rows sort into layers while tusks hold the stable frame.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds one tusk shelf open for a modeling choice.
motionSignature.failed: Whisker rows sag and tusks tilt out of level.
motionSignature.review: Turns head to sight down one perfect row.

lines.audienceWorkflow: notebooks, analysis, experiments, literate data work
lines.whyItLands: The page-body metaphor feels familiar to notebook users without using a known app symbol.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No orbit logos, notebook UI, app names, cloud-colab marks, or exact color bands.
lines.visualLock: A slim newt with page-like dorsal plates that turn as part of the body.

motionSignature.locomotion: Careful crawl where dorsal plates flip one after another.
motionSignature.jumping: Page flip-hop: back plates turn, body rises, plates flatten on landing.
motionSignature.running: Dorsal plates cycle from rough notes to clean result shapes.
motionSignature.waiting: One plate stays blank and raised for the next cell.
motionSignature.failed: Plates fold backward and the newt retreats a step.
motionSignature.review: Nose checks plate order from head to tail.

lines.audienceWorkflow: meetings, transcripts, async updates, summaries
lines.whyItLands: The moth-to-light behavior is a gentle joke about meetings without targeting a company.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No video-app logos, camera icons, meeting UI, transcript screenshots, or exact app colors.
lines.visualLock: A soft moth with transcript-like wing veins and a tiny warm body glow.

motionSignature.locomotion: Flutter drift, slightly attracted to an implied focus point.
motionSignature.jumping: Light bob: wing veins brighten, body rises, then settles away from distraction.
motionSignature.running: Wing veins align into short summary rows, then relax.
motionSignature.waiting: Hovers with wings half-open as if waiting for the next speaker.
motionSignature.failed: Circles once too tightly and wings droop.
motionSignature.review: Holds still at a thoughtful angle, wing veins neat.

lines.audienceWorkflow: customer signal, feedback synthesis, product discovery, CRM hygiene
lines.whyItLands: The heron makes customer signal feel calm and selective without borrowing any company mark.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No cloud marks, CRM logos, mascot families, app UI, customer-record screenshots, sound-wave icons, or loose signal symbols.
lines.visualLock: A white folded heron with charcoal crease lines, long poised legs, origami-like wing facets, and a small cyan throat accent distinct from Zentri.

motionSignature.locomotion: Slow heron steps with neck poised and wing facets settling after each step.
motionSignature.jumping: Tiny floating tuck where legs fold under, body lifts, then returns to one-leg balance.
motionSignature.running: Beak and neck trace a slow S curve while wing facets fold noisy angles into one cyan signal thread.
motionSignature.waiting: Meditative tuck opens one eye toward the user while the beak points gently to the cyan throat accent.
motionSignature.failed: Wing facets ruffle into noisy angles, the neck loses its clean S curve, and the cyan accent dims.
motionSignature.review: Stands tall and opens both folded wings just enough to reveal one clean cyan line.

lines.audienceWorkflow: AI eval harnesses, test rubrics, benchmark analysis
lines.whyItLands: Eval loops become a body movement rather than a chart or badge.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No benchmark logos, lab marks, model names, scoreboards, or chart screenshots.
lines.visualLock: A ribbon-like eel with small scale ticks that can align into rubric passes.

motionSignature.locomotion: Looping swim where the body crosses itself cleanly without tangling.
motionSignature.jumping: Rubric loop: body forms a small loop, lifts, then straightens.
motionSignature.running: Scale ticks pass in groups as if test cases are being evaluated.
motionSignature.waiting: Body forms an open loop, waiting for criteria.
motionSignature.failed: Loop kinks and two scale ticks misalign.
motionSignature.review: Straightens into a clear line while one scale group pulses.

lines.audienceWorkflow: code search, repository navigation, indexing
lines.whyItLands: Swimming upstream maps to persistent code search and repo traversal.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No search-product marks, magnifier icons as logos, index UI, or exact vendor palettes.
lines.visualLock: A salmon with scale bands that act like search-result cadence.

motionSignature.locomotion: Upstream swimming through air with tail beats as search steps.
motionSignature.jumping: Clean upstream leap with a tail flick at peak.
motionSignature.running: Nose darts between implied results while scale bands pulse.
motionSignature.waiting: Suspends mid-swim for query refinement.
motionSignature.failed: Tail slows and the body drifts downstream.
motionSignature.review: Turns sideways to inspect one result closely.

lines.audienceWorkflow: isolated experiments, preview environments, dev sandboxes
lines.whyItLands: The seal can feel playful and safe while representing isolation and experiments.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No sandbox-platform logos, cloud UI, app names, or proprietary environment icons.
lines.visualLock: A round seal with a subtle body-contained ring that reads as a sandbox boundary.

motionSignature.locomotion: Belly slide with the boundary ring keeping pace.
motionSignature.jumping: Ring bounce: body pops up while the ring compresses and expands.
motionSignature.running: Nose tests the boundary from inside, then returns to center.
motionSignature.waiting: Balances inside the ring, asking whether to keep or discard.
motionSignature.failed: Ring squashes unevenly and the seal looks back at it.
motionSignature.review: Rolls the ring slightly to inspect isolation.

lines.audienceWorkflow: package managers, dependency registries, version upgrades
lines.whyItLands: Scales make dependencies visible without package-manager marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No package-manager logos, yarn/animal mascots, registry UI, or exact command icons.
lines.visualLock: A pangolin whose scales behave like versioned packages.

motionSignature.locomotion: Curl-unroll walk with scales settling in dependency order.
motionSignature.jumping: Version bump curl: rolls up, lifts slightly, unrolls with one scale advanced.
motionSignature.running: Scales flip in dependency-chain cadence from head to tail.
motionSignature.waiting: Half-curled with one scale raised for version choice.
motionSignature.failed: Curls tightly with mismatched scales showing.
motionSignature.review: Uncurls just enough to inspect scale alignment.

lines.audienceWorkflow: build caches, dependency caches, warm starts
lines.whyItLands: Stashing and retrieving maps naturally to caching without product marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No build-tool logos, turbo marks, package icons, or cache dashboard UI.
lines.visualLock: A small squirrel with tail pockets that hold body-attached cache blocks.

motionSignature.locomotion: Fast stash-and-scamper with tail stabilizing every stop.
motionSignature.jumping: Cache hop where paws tuck close and tail flips forward.
motionSignature.running: Paws place tiny attached cache blocks into tail fur pockets.
motionSignature.waiting: Clutches one cache block and looks for confirmation.
motionSignature.failed: Drops into a startled crouch with tail wrapped around stash.
motionSignature.review: Sniffs a cache block, then nods with tail held high.

lines.audienceWorkflow: containers, local services, compose-style development
lines.whyItLands: A modular shell gives the container idea without using famous container mascots.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No whale mascots, container-platform logos, product names, or dashboard UI.
lines.visualLock: A hermit with a modular shell made of original compartment shapes.

motionSignature.locomotion: Sideways shell shuffle with fast legs and stable compartments.
motionSignature.jumping: Tiny shell-lift where the service stack rises as one protected unit.
motionSignature.running: Shell panels open and close as services start, stop, and settle.
motionSignature.waiting: Half-hides with one claw holding a compartment open.
motionSignature.failed: Compartments misalign and the hermit tucks halfway inside.
motionSignature.review: Turns shell side-on to expose compartment order.

lines.audienceWorkflow: clusters, scheduling, pod placement, service health
lines.whyItLands: Balanced body spots make scheduling readable without orchestration marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No helm wheels, orchestration logos, vendor dashboards, or exact product terms.
lines.visualLock: A compact puffer with spots that inflate in balanced groups.

motionSignature.locomotion: Buoyant drift with fins correcting position like a scheduler.
motionSignature.jumping: Inflate-lift where the body rounds gently, rises, and deflates.
motionSignature.running: Body spots inflate in balanced groups as capacity is placed.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds three spots half-inflated for scheduling input.
motionSignature.failed: Inflation becomes lopsided and fins tuck close.
motionSignature.review: Rolls slightly to expose one balanced group.

lines.audienceWorkflow: feature flags, experiments, progressive rollout
lines.whyItLands: A fox tail can carry rollout states without borrowing flag-platform brands.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No launch-platform logos, flag-product names, dashboard UI, or exact toggle icons.
lines.visualLock: A fox with tail panels that flip between muted rollout states.

motionSignature.locomotion: Quiet trot with tail panels trailing in rollout order.
motionSignature.jumping: Canary hop: front paws lift, one tail panel flips, then all settle.
motionSignature.running: Tail panels flip from closed to partial to open in a smooth progression.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds one panel halfway for approval.
motionSignature.failed: Tail panels snap back out of order.
motionSignature.review: Turns tail toward the viewer and checks the panel sequence.

lines.audienceWorkflow: release checklists, deploys, changelogs
lines.whyItLands: Release motion is immediately legible and product-neutral.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No deploy-platform marks, exact launch UI, product names, or detached flame effects.
lines.visualLock: A small rounded rocket with attached flame shape and expressive fins.

motionSignature.locomotion: Controlled hover-slide with fins steering.
motionSignature.jumping: Launch bob: body compresses down, rises on attached flame, settles.
motionSignature.running: Fins check sequence while attached flame pulses in checklist cadence.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds launchpad posture with nose angled at user.
motionSignature.failed: Nose dips and flame shrinks into body.
motionSignature.review: Tilts to inspect final checklist with fins locked.

lines.audienceWorkflow: incident response, escalation, on-call handoff
lines.whyItLands: A calm response pet is useful and respectful for stressful work.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No pager logos, incident-platform names, alert UI, sirens, or vendor colors.
lines.visualLock: A composed axolotl with frills that show calm response state.

motionSignature.locomotion: Gentle steps with frills pulsing like controlled breathing.
motionSignature.jumping: Soft waterless bounce with frills folding in and out.
motionSignature.running: Frills pulse slowly while paws move through response steps.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds steady eye contact for escalation choice.
motionSignature.failed: Frills droop but posture stays composed.
motionSignature.review: Head lowers and frills align symmetrically.

lines.audienceWorkflow: secure review, threat modeling, policy checks
lines.whyItLands: The sentinel stance feels protective without relying on security-vendor marks.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No security-vendor logos, proprietary shield marks, scanner UI, lock logos, or product names.
lines.visualLock: A compact sentinel creature with a chest plate and narrow attentive eyes.

motionSignature.locomotion: Measured guard steps with chest plate staying forward.
motionSignature.jumping: Brace-hop: crouches behind chest plate, lifts, then lands guard-first.
motionSignature.running: Eyes sweep while chest plate facets check policy states.
motionSignature.waiting: Holds guard stance with one paw open for a decision.
motionSignature.failed: Chest plate tilts and eyes narrow with concern.
motionSignature.review: Locks plate forward and leans into close inspection.

lines.audienceWorkflow: human approval, governance, blocked agent tasks
lines.whyItLands: Agent users recognize waiting-on-human loops immediately.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No approval-tool logos, checkbox badges, workflow UI, or product names.
lines.visualLock: A patient alpaca with a neck posture that can point toward the user.

motionSignature.locomotion: Slow careful step with neck keeping attention forward.
motionSignature.jumping: Polite hop where front knees lift first and the neck stays composed.
motionSignature.running: Neck dips and rises in a review-ready approval cadence.
motionSignature.waiting: Stares gently at the user with one hoof lifted.
motionSignature.failed: Neck droops and the lifted hoof settles.
motionSignature.review: Turns slightly sideways and gives one restrained nod.

lines.audienceWorkflow: prompt iteration, instruction refinement, agent steering
lines.whyItLands: It already fits the AI-agent audience and stays product-neutral.
lines.brandSafetyGuardrails: No AI-lab marks, chat UI, speech bubbles, model names, or exact brand palettes.
lines.visualLock: A compact parrot with readable beak cadence and prompt-clause feather ordering.

motionSignature.locomotion: Perch shuffle with beak leading and tail feathers balancing.
motionSignature.jumping: Short perch flap with beak opening but no text bubble.
motionSignature.running: Beak opens and closes in measured beats while feathers reorder like prompt clauses.
motionSignature.waiting: Head cocks sharply, waiting to echo the next instruction.
motionSignature.failed: Feathers ruffle and beak closes tight.
motionSignature.review: Beak points down and eye tracks the prompt shape.
